# 7 cybersecurity trends for 2026

## Uncover emerging risks and the strategies you need to stay ahead of them.

Explore the insights

## Trusted by over 17,000 organizations, from Fortune 500 to growing businesses across every industry.

Our expert teams help you find tailored solutions across a broad range of sectors including retail, manufacturing, government, finance, healthcare, and education.

* Healthcare
* Government
* Education
* Finance
* Manufacturing
* View all

### Next-Generation Infrastructure

SHI modernizes healthcare IT infrastructure with advanced, secure solutions from top technology providers tailored to help your healthcare system achieve the Quintuple Aim, improving patient care throughout the entire process.

Learn more

By identifying and removing 689 instances of end-of-life software, we were able to help eliminate potential vulnerabilities and improve the customer’s cybersecurity posture.

Learn more

### End-user computing

SHI helps schools and universities optimize limited budgets while enhancing security. From creating AWS landing zones to streamlining device deployments, we understand the unique challenges of education technology.

Learn more

Students loved the seamless gameplay, and I loved that we could finally scale the program without breaking our budget.

Learn more

### Cost Optimization

SHI's cost savings assessments have identified actionable opportunities to optimize cloud costs by up to 70%, saving organizations $170K monthly while maintaining SOX compliance and strengthening security postures.

Learn more

SHI provided Microsoft Azure optimizations and insights, reducing compute costs by 70% and saving $170K/month.

Learn more

### Software Licensing

Serving over 12,000 government entities, SHI delivers authorized solutions that meet stringent security requirements. Our software licensing expertise helps agencies maintain compliance, optimize software licensing, and enhance security postures while maximizing limited budgets.

Learn more

SHI helped lower the compliance bill down to $5 million, minimizing financial risk, while helping consolidate the numerous departments’ disparate software purchasing processes

Learn more

### Data center infrastructure

From factory floor to supply chain, SHI helps manufacturers build resilient IT infrastructure that drives operational excellence. We've helped leading manufacturers to renovate network infrastructure, secure operational technology (OT) environments, and enable IoT integration ensuring production continuity while embracing Industry 4.0 transformation.

Learn more

After completion of the five-month project, network performance increased drastically saving 30% over the incumbent’s proposed solution.

Learn more

See all case studies

## One partner to help you reduce complexity and drive secure innovation and scalable growth

Whether you’re a growing startup or a global enterprise, organizations like yours rely on SHI to select, deploy, and manage the right solutions to drive secure innovation and scale with ease.

#### 1 | Select

### Strategic consulting to reduce technology risk

Our unbiased assessments, briefings and workshops help you identify security gaps, integration risks, and hidden costs before you buy. As a global solutions provider with expertise across all major technology platforms, we provide vendor-agnostic recommendations that align technology investments with your business objectives, helping you avoid costly mistakes.

#### 2 | Deploy

### Global reach, local expertise

From thousands of endpoints to complex data center builds, our global deployment capabilities deliver seamless rollouts. Our integration centers provide secure configuration, testing, and direct-to-user shipping, achieving near-perfect first-time success rates while maintaining zero-trust security throughout.

#### 3 | Manage

### Always-on IT management

Our managed services and security operations teams monitor billions of events daily, providing rapid incident response and continuous compliance monitoring. With around-the-clock assistance, proactive security monitoring, and lifecycle management, we help keep your IT environment secure, optimized, and supported.

Connect with an SHI expert

## With the right solutions, services, and support, anything is possible

From seamless hardware and software procurement solutions to licensing advisory, data center integration services, ITAM, and AI solutions, SHI has all your IT needs covered.

### Generative AI Solutions

SHI provides vendor-neutral technical guidance across the AI ecosystem, helping you navigate generative AI platform selection, integration, and optimization.

Get your AI Briefing

### Digital AI Ambassador Platform

Deploy AI assistants that resolve employee issues instantly. Our Digital AI Ambassador Platform delivers instant, AI-powered support for onboarding, troubleshooting, and solution discovery – at scale and on demand.

Learn more

### Data Center Solutions

Transform your data ecosystem with SHI's integrated data center solutions. Our expertise spans AI-optimized storage, high-performance compute clusters, and advanced cooling systems, ensuring your data center is ready for AI, big data, and IoT workloads.

Learn more

### Data Center Integration Services

SHI's Data Center Integration Services experts design, build, test, and deploy your complete IT infrastructure. Our certified engineers pre-configure server racks, reducing deployment time from months to weeks. With rigorous quality control and real-time project visibility through SHI One, we ensure hassle-free installation and immediate productivity.

Learn more

### End-User Computing

SHI's end-user computing experts help you deliver rich employee experiences from day one. With decades of experience across all major platforms, we streamline device procurement, deployment, and management. From zero-touch provisioning to unified endpoint management, we ensure your workforce stays productive regardless of location.

Learn more

### SHI Next Gen Device Lab

SHI's Next-Gen Devices Lab provides a risk-free environment to test and compare next-generation AI computers and devices from leading manufacturers before you invest. You can evaluate AI-based hardware, actual workloads, and specific use cases, comparing device performance in real time and benchmarking against industry standards.

Learn more

### Modern Workplace Solutions

Drive adoption of modern productivity tools without adding complexity. Our digital workplace experts combine deep product knowledge with user understanding to implement Microsoft 365, collaboration platforms, and virtual desktop solutions. We help you maximize ROI while ensuring secure, seamless access from any device.

Learn more

### Digital Employee Experiences

An effective digital employee experience (DEX) strategy helps you address issues and meet employee expectations without overburdening IT staff. Our DEX service allows you to choose the best deployment and management option for your needs so you can measure and improve system metrics and act on employee sentiment

Learn more

### Cybersecurity Solutions

As your vendor-neutral partner, SHI's certified architects help you select, deploy, and manage integrated security solutions from top vendors and develop a comprehensive cybersecurity strategy.

Learn more

### SHI Identity Maturity Workshop

This workshop gives your team a clear view of your current identity posture and a practical path forward in just four simple steps. We'll assess your tools and capabilities across six IAM pillars, identify where risks still exist, and provide actionable guidance to help you close the gaps and build a more resilient identity architecture.

Learn more

## Built with the best in tech

We bring you the most advanced solutions and products on the market by teaming up with tech giants like Microsoft, AWS, Cisco, and hundreds of other industry leaders.

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

Cookies Settings

## Cookie Preference Center

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. [For more information about SHI's use of cookies, click here](https://www.shi.com/terms/privacy-statement/cookie-policy)  
[SHI's Privacy Policy](https://www.shi.com/terms/privacy-statement)

Allow All

### Manage Consent Preferences

#### Performance Cookies

Performance Cookies

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

#### Targeting Cookies

Targeting Cookies

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

#### Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

#### Functional Cookies

Functional Cookies

These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
